holdings.infoBox: MGV is an equity ETF with a total of 129 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 5.25%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 3.63%, Berkshire Hathaway at 3.14%, Exxon Mobil at 2.91%, and Johnson & Johnson at 2.61%.

overview.description: The Vanguard Mega Cap Value ETF (MGV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the CRSP US Mega Value index. The fund tracks an index of mega-cap stocks in the US. Holdings are selected and weighed based on five value factors. MGV was launched on Dec 17, 2007 and is issued by Vanguard.
